---
title: "Visual Analytics and Applications"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

::: welcome-section
Hello I am Tran Thi Thanh Van, you can call me Haley.

Welcome to **ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Applications** homepage.

In this website, you will find my coursework. Materials here are based on <a href="https://isss608-ay2025-26apr.netlify.app">https://isss608-ay2025-26apr.netlify.app</a> by Prof Kam Tin Seong from SMU.
:::

# Hands On Exercise

::::::: card-grid
:::::: card
<a href="Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex01/Hands-on_Ex01.html">

::: card-image
<img src="images/ex1-preview.png" alt="Exercise 1 preview"/>
:::

:::: card-content
<h3>Hands-on Exercise 1 - A Layered Grammar of Graphics: ggplot2 methods</h3>

::: card-footer
[THI THANH VAN TRAN]{.author} [APR 16, 2026]{.date}
:::
::::

</a>
::::::
:::::::

# In-class Exercise

::::::: card-grid
:::::: card
<a href="In-class%Ex/In-class%Ex01/In-class%Ex01.html">

::: card-image
<img src="images/inclass_ex1_preview.png" alt="In-class Exercise 1 preview"/>
:::

:::: card-content
<h3>Analysing Superstore dataset</h3>

::: card-footer
[THI THANH VAN TRAN]{.author} [APR 18, 2026]{.date}
:::
::::

</a>
::::::
:::::::
